fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Base font size in pixels for the notes editor.

fontFamily.label: Text Font
fontFamily.description: CSS font-family value. Use commas to specify fallbacks.

codeFontFamily.label: Monospace Font
codeFontFamily.description: Font for inline code and fenced code blocks.

lineHeight.label: Line Height
lineHeight.description: Spacing between lines. Relaxed is easier to read, compact fits more content.

indentSize.label: Indent Size
indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indent level for lists and nested content.

limitWidth.label: Limit Width
limitWidth.description: Constrain content to a comfortable reading width (700px).

lineNumbers.label: Line Numbers
lineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the gutter. Only available in Raw mode.

theme.label: 主題
theme.dirDescription: Place your JSON theme files in this folder.

port.label: API 連接埠
port.description: API 伺服器的連接埠號碼（需要重新啟動應用程式）。有效範圍：1024-65535。
